This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Spider Legs
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:20:55
Page Updated:Thu Jan 22nd, 2026

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 2pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 3

▲ Page top
Purchased in Jaggedpine
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 3:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570529546
24 posts
Spider Legs can also be purchased from a vendor in Jaggedpine Forest named Pergan Darkcloud. He is right next to the banker at the Fort. The only vendor that I know of that sells them. He also is the only vendor that sells cheese (to my knowledge).

Edited 10/9/02 OK, apparently he doesn't sell spider legs any more. I bought a stack of 20 from him once but when I went back for more recently, he didn't have any - must've been sold by a player at the time. Sorry about the misinformation.

Edited, Wed Oct 9 15:54:26 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Purchased in Jaggedpine
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2004 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761679561
12 posts
Pergan Darkcloud does not sell Spider Legs. Had a patch few days ago, so all he had on him was what he always sells and spider legs isnt one of these items. But .. he Does sell Cheese, that was correct.

Edited, Tue Jul 6 15:56:27 2004
▲ Page top
Use
QuoteReply
# May 29 2002 at 1:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756918651
99 posts
Spider Legs are useful for practicing Brewing. Of the two brews that trivial at 102, they are part of the easiest one to get parts for.

Spider Legs are also used to make Halas Heaters, which used to be a lost recipe.

See eqtraders.com
▲ Page top
Found on spiders
QuoteReply
# May 29 2002 at 4:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1660522646382
73 posts
To save time, lets just say that the legs are found on most, if not all, spiders on Norrath.

Are there any spiders on Luclin?

Also, found occasionally on spiderlings as well.
